name: Enterprise Risk Register
description: A universal risk register available to every tenant: each risk is scored by severity x likelihood and plotted on the risk heatmap by domain. Carries no event or rule of its own, so it installs alongside any tenant's foundation (which owns RecordReceived) without collision.

entities.description: A single risk in the tenant's risk register, rated by severity and likelihood.

kpis.name: Enterprise risk index
kpis.description: Severity multiplied by likelihood for a tenant risk; drives the risk heatmap.
